title: Mansi Budamagunta
text: I’m a data scientist with a research background who applies computational methods to study complex real-world problems at the intersection of data and public interest. I’ve worked across several domains — including LLM training pipelines for leading AI labs, urban data analytics, transportation networks, and computational neuroscience. I am currently completing an MSc in Applied Data Science at Utrecht University, where my thesis examines EU research funding through computational text analysis.
